user_story: As a visitor, I want an animated starfield background so that the pages have a distinctive visual identity.
expected_behaviour: A canvas element fills its container absolutely (aria-hidden, pointer-events-none). On mount, stars are initialised at density 1 per 4000px². Each star has a random position, radius (0.3–1.8px), opacity, speed, and colour from 4 options (white, purple, teal, pink). Stars flicker via a sine wave on their opacity. When prefers-reduced-motion is detected, stars are drawn once without animation. Canvas resizes with the window. RAF is cancelled on component unmount.
inventory_notes: prefers-reduced-motion check is done once at mount; it does not reactively update if the user changes their OS setting mid-session.
